creator: freebsd@troback.com
text:
Maintainer update of net-mgmt/nagios-check_ports.

Fix: PORTNAME=      check_ports
-PORTVERSION=   0.6
+PORTVERSION=   0.6.1
 CATEGORIES=    net-mgmt
 MASTER_SITES=  http://code.adminlife.net/check_ports/files/
 PKGNAMEPREFIX= nagios-


-- 
This message has been scanned for viruses and
dangerous content by MailScanner, and is
believed to be clean.--UmWdT8g35wfbkbrb4X9oHYYN4mDbWkA90XKrPMtguMN1B1Vn

Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit

diff -ruN nagios-check_ports.org/Makefile nagios-check_ports/Makefile
--- nagios-check_ports.org/Makefile     2009-03-10 11:18:03.000000000 +0100
+++ nagios-check_ports/Makefile 2009-03-10 11:18:32.000000000 +0100
